title: Outlook Integration and Inbox
excerpt: We have an outlook integration that takes (4) incoming emails from outlook and adds them to a board. The purpose was to reduce inbox clutter in outlook - however now all we have done is created (4) emails in the monday i…

posts.author: K_Couture (Kris Couture)
posts.cookedHtml: We have an outlook integration that takes (4) incoming emails from outlook and adds them to a board. The purpose was to reduce inbox clutter in outlook - however now all we have done is created (4) emails in the monday inbox - is there any way to disable them from creating inbox items?
